alignment-auditor subagent exists at .claude/agents/alignment-auditor.md (STORY-473 dependency). Properly configured with read-only tools (Read, Glob, Grep) and documented proactive triggers for Phase 5.5 invocation.

All 52 test cases passed (100% pass rate). AC#1-AC#10 fully verified. Integration points tested: file paths, section structure, layer detection, subagent invocation, blocking behavior, gap synthesis, CLAUDE.md gaps, graceful degradation, accepted risk, 6-step workflow.
